LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR ORDER DISCHARGING PLTF FROM LIABILITY & AWARDING ATTYS FEES & COSTS NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS THE ORDER OF THE COURT: PLAINTIFF HARTFORD FIRE INSURANCE' MOTION FOR ORDER DISCHARGING PLAINTIFF FROM LIABILITY & AWARDING ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED -- NO OPPOSITION FILED. $7,647.82 IS AWARDED ON ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE, REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR # 7855

calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Discharging Pltf From Liability & Awarding Attys Fees & Costs
Off Calendar May-06-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Plaintiff HARTFORD FIRE INSURANCE' motion for order discharging Plaintiff from liability & awarding attorney's fees and costs is granted -- no opposition filed. $7,647.82 is awarded on attorneys fees and costs. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
